chunks.title: The Covenant Renewal
chunks.reason: Describes the gathering of elders and the king's covenant ceremony.

chunks.title: Religious Reforms in Judah and Samaria
chunks.reason: Details the systematic removal of idols, high places, and priests across the land.

chunks.title: Celebration of Passover
chunks.reason: Records the command to celebrate Passover and its historical significance.

chunks.title: Evaluation of Josiah's Reign
chunks.reason: Summarizes the extent of reforms and God's final judgment on Judah.

chunks.title: Death of Josiah and Succession
chunks.reason: Narrates the king's death at Megiddo and the brief reigns of Jehoahaz and Jehoiakim.
